title: Luxurious Creamy Brazilian Pineapple Tart
description: A show-stopping lacto-vegetarian dessert featuring caramelized pineapple, creamy coconut custard, and a hint of cinnamon, all in a flaky pastry crust. This winey and creamy tart is sure to impress any dinner guest.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough and place it in a tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, sugar, melted butter, and eggs.
Add the flour, port wine, and vanilla extract to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
Arrange the pineapple slices in a pattern on the tart dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Pour the coconut custard over the pineapple slices and smooth the top.
Bake the tart for 40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
Just before serving, garnish with a cinnamon stick and slice into wedges.
